name: addComment
description: Adds a comment to the document at the specified text range. Use listComments to retrieve the comment ID after creation. Note: programmatically created comments appear in the comments panel but may not show as anchored highlights in the document UI.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

startIndex.description: The starting index of the text range (inclusive, starts from 1).

endIndex.description: The ending index of the text range (exclusive).

content.description: The text content of the comment.
